CommunityApplications.Profile: VideoWare is a self-hosted media upload and processing platform. This repository provides a single, self-contained Unraid app (the monolithic image) that bundles the Next.js web app, PocketBase database/API, the FFmpeg background worker, and an internal Redis broker - everything runs in one container with one data path and one port. Upload media, generate thumbnails and sprites, edit and render clips on a timeline, and run AI video analysis. For questions, bug reports, and support, please use the GitHub issue tracker.
